display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（挨打猫 v1.1・小小维修兔 v1.32・文生图测试版 v2D）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: restores the user-editable free image-generation site field, keeps custom API model fetching, and removes conflicting mandatory layout rules that encouraged fixed-height/absolute-positioned long text. Complex interaction remains; disabled image generation means zero image prompt construction and zero image requests.
